description:
Advances: specled.decisions, specled.modal_class

Deliverable:
Extend the decision/requirement/scenario schemas with the structured fields that AppendOnly needs; add the pure ModalClass classifier; introduce the CrossField validator behind DecisionParser.parse_file/2; ratify the 12 new finding codes in a budget ADR. Land everything before AppendOnly wiring starts.

Concrete additions:
- decision schema: `change_type` (optional enum: deprecates | weakens | narrows-scope | adds-exception | supersedes | clarifies | refines), `reverses_what` (optional string), `replaces` (optional list of ids).
- requirement schema: `polarity` (:positive | :negative, optional), `refines` (optional id), `supersedes` (optional id).
- scenario schema: `execute` (optional boolean), `reason` (optional string).
- new module `SpecLedEx.DecisionParser.CrossField` with `validate(decision, current_index, opts) :: [error]` implementing 7 rules (Appendix A of the refined plan).
- new module `SpecLedEx.ModalClass` with pure `classify/1` and total `downgrade?/2`. No version function, no cache.
- new ADR `.spec/decisions/specled.decision.append_only_finding_budget.md` justifying 12 codes (10 append_only/* + 2 overlap/*) against `specled.decision.finding_code_budget`.
- update `.spec/specs/decision_governance.spec.md` with requirements for the enum, the 4-value weakening set, CrossField rules, and change_type optionality.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: mix test test/specled_ex/modal_class_test.exs test/specled_ex/decision_parser/cross_field_test.exs test/specled_ex/schema_test.exs
- Behaviors to demonstrate:
  - specled.modal_class.classify_total (modal_class.spec.md scenarios)
  - specled.modal_class.downgrade_total, downgrade_monotonic, cross_polarity_conservative
  - CrossField rules R1..R7 emit expected errors on crafted inputs; idempotence property (same input -> same errors) from T8 #4.
  - decision schema accepts the new fields; requirement and scenario schemas accept the new optional fields without breaking existing fixtures.
- Spec verification stubs to flip from execute: false to execute: true: every stub in modal_class.spec.md plus the CrossField additions authored under decision_governance.spec.md.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/append_only.ex (belongs to W2a)
- lib/specled_ex/overlap.ex (belongs to W2b)
- lib/specled_ex/branch_check.ex (belongs to W2b)
- lib/specled_ex/config.ex (belongs to W3)
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.check.ex (belongs to W3)
- .spec/decisions/*.md other than the new budget ADR (W1.5 backfills the 19 legacy ADRs)

Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- lib/specled_ex/schema/decision.ex
- lib/specled_ex/schema/requirement.ex
- lib/specled_ex/schema/scenario.ex
- lib/specled_ex/decision_parser.ex
- lib/specled_ex/decision_parser/cross_field.ex (new)
- lib/specled_ex/modal_class.ex (new)
- .spec/specs/decision_governance.spec.md
- .spec/specs/modal_class.spec.md
- .spec/decisions/specled.decision.append_only_finding_budget.md (new)
- test/specled_ex/modal_class_test.exs (new)
- test/specled_ex/decision_parser/cross_field_test.exs (new)
- test/specled_ex/schema_test.exs or equivalent existing schema tests

Out of Scope (intent):
- No AppendOnly behavior lands yet; detectors stay out until W2a.
- No change to existing 19 ADRs (W1.5 handles backfill after this stage).
- Do not introduce caching of modal_class on requirement structs or in state.json (explicitly rejected by specled.decision.modal_class_diff_time).
- Do not add a `modal_class_version` field (explicitly cut per refined plan B4).
- Do not widen the finding-code budget beyond the 12 ratified in the new ADR.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] mix spec.validate green (CrossField rules do not flag the new ADR against itself)
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: W1: Structured ADR schema + CrossField + ModalClass + finding-budget ADR
